goal: Build a Franka with surface_gripper (suction) instead of parallel-finger gripper. 4 cubes from conveyor → bin via vacuum pickup. Validates surface_gripper tool integration. Note: cuRobo controller still uses Franka's default ParallelGripper for arm motion; surface_gripper is an OmniGraph-side complement.
thoughts:
Six surface-gripper specifics for CP-54 (extends CP-01 — adds suction):
1) surface_gripper installs OgnSurfaceGripper OmniGraph node attached to /World/Franka/panda_hand.
2) Suction parameters: grip_threshold=0.01m (objects within 1cm grab), force_limit=100N, torque_limit=100Nm.
3) Standard cuRobo controller still drives arm motion. Surface gripper is a parallel mechanism — the OmniGraph node grips items via FixedJoint regardless of finger position.
4) Real industrial: vacuum gripper for flat items (boxes, sheets, suckable surfaces).
5) Cube physics unchanged; surface gripper adds adhesion when in proximity.
6) Demonstrates the tool's installation pattern for downstream UR10/scenarios.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Install surface gripper (suction) on Franka's panda_hand
surface_gripper(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    ee_link="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    grip_threshold=0.01,
    force_limit=100.0,
    torque_limit=100.0,
)

# Standard cuRobo controller drives arm motion
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-54 demonstrates surface_gripper tool installation. The OgnSurfaceGripper OmniGraph node attaches to panda_hand and provides parallel-grip-mechanism alongside the default ParallelGripper. Realizes infrastructure for #25 UR10BinFilling, #27 UR10BinStacking, #29 SurfaceGripperGantry, #33 UR10ConveyorCortex.
failure_modes: OgnSurfaceGripper extension not enabled in Kit — handler errors. Most Isaac Sim builds include it.
Panda_hand link doesn't exist — robot_wizard's franka_panda creates it; verify path.
Both ParallelGripper AND SurfaceGripper active — they don't conflict, but cube grip dynamics depend on which mechanism activates first.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (with 180s sim — orig 60s too short. cube_final=(0.04, -0.46, 0.785) in Bin)
